title: bust
blurb: a marble bust silkscreened under a slow, drifting colour wash
note: accent is the violet ink the wash shows at posterTick 450 — the top band of the analogous violet station, and the vaporwave-bust look the piece is named for; geometry is frozen and the 720-tick loop is pane-independent, so the same tick reads in both poster shapes — no posterTickPortrait needed
